questionHtml: Explain how acetylcholine initiates an action potential in a postsynaptic membrane.
markschemeHtml:
a. acetylcholine binds to the receptor protein ✔

b. (causing a) change in tertiary structure / conformation of protein ✔

c. diffusion/entry of ions / Na+ through the receptor/channel protein allowed ✔

meta.title: Explain how acetylcholine initiates an action potential in a postsynaptic membrane.
